nodes.label: Implementation sequence for AI coding tools
nodes.norm_label: implementation sequence for ai coding tools

nodes.label: Chat-first interaction principle
nodes.rationale: All interaction is a message. The user never navigates. Upload, processing, corrections and download happen within a message flow.

nodes.label: Monochromatic design principle
nodes.rationale: Black (#0a0a0a) and white (#fafafa). Neutral grays as intermediate scale. Zero decoration.

nodes.label: Human-in-the-loop (HITL) pattern
nodes.rationale: LLM with HITL for uncertainties. Feedback (progress, errors, HITL) are messages in chat, not modals.

nodes.label: cleaner.py (pandas: header detection, ffill, footer discard)
nodes.norm_label: cleaner.py (pandas: header detection, ffill, footer discard)

nodes.label: Controlled vocabulary (categoria, banho, tipo_pedra, marca, zirconia)
nodes.norm_label: controlled vocabulary (categoria, banho, tipo_pedra, marca, zirconia)

nodes.label: Agent flow: upload → clean → LLM structured output → HITL → download
nodes.norm_label: agent flow: upload → clean → llm structured output → hitl → download

nodes.label: ValidationError retry mechanism (1x auto-retry, then HITL)
nodes.rationale: Outputs outside controlled vocabulary trigger ValidationError → automatic retry (1x) re-sending error to LLM; if persists, becomes duvida_pendente=True for HITL.
nodes.norm_label: validationerror retry mechanism (1x auto-retry, then hitl)

nodes.label: Supplier/type detection by content (not filename)
nodes.rationale: The ALAN/LUIS prefix in filename is the operator (person), NOT the supplier. Detection is done by spreadsheet content (keyword/ideogram), never by operator name.

nodes.label: Restricted Monochrome color strategy
nodes.rationale: Dark-first. Black + white + neutral grays. Zero decorative color. Semantic colors only for state feedback (success/error/warning).

nodes.label: Claude.ai (Anthropic) as visual reference
nodes.rationale: Dark, minimal, chat-first design. Reference for typography, spacing, component behavior.

nodes.label: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance
nodes.rationale: Contrast >= 4.5:1 on all text. Full keyboard navigation. Associated labels. No hover-only interactions.

nodes.label: Demo state machine (empty → uploaded → processing → hitl → result)
nodes.norm_label: demo state machine (empty → uploaded → processing → hitl → result)

nodes.norm_label: chat ui components (sidebar, messages, composer, hitl card)
